input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.3.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have a sensor or switch to measure brake pedal position or brake system

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.3.1: The vehicle must have a sensor or switch to measure brake pedal position or brake system
T.4.3.1 The vehicle must have a sensor or switch to measure brake pedal position or brake system 
pressure

final_answer: The vehicle must have a sensor or switch to measure brake pedal position or brake system pressure
